detail.title: Dispute

accept.heading: Dispute Successfully Accepted

comment.heading: Your comment sent
comment.description:
Your comment for {key} has been successfully sent to the Transport Admin.

You will get a notification if the admin approved your comment or not.

signed.title: Week {week}

success.title: Success! Your week has been signed

success.processed: You will receive a notification once it has been processed by the administrator. A summary of this week is now available via the link below.

sign.title: Review and Sign Your Work Week
sign.warning: Make sure everything looks correct before signing. Once submitted, your workdays will be locked and sent for final processing.
sign.alreadySigned: This week has already been signed. You can view it below.
